info.title: PostHelper.Cli
info.description: Improve your tweets/posts with AI powered by GitHub Copilot. Draft tweets from URLs, apply multiple styles (Professional, Friendly, Hype), and control emoji levels.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Improve your tweets with AI powered by GitHub Copilot

options.name: --style
options.description: The style/tone for the improved tweet [default: Professional]

options.name: --emoji
options.description: The level of emoji usage [default: Default]

options.name: --model
options.description: The AI model to use (interactive picker if not specified)

options.name: --url
options.description: URL to fetch and draft a tweet from

arguments.name: tweet
arguments.description: The tweet text to improve (or pipe via stdin)
